title: Architect Production Data Masking for Staging
description: Architect automated workflows for cloning, anonymizing, and subsetting production data for staging environments. Implement production data masking to enable high-fidelity debugging and testing while maintaining data privacy.
objectives: Architect automated workflows for cloning, anonymizing, and subsetting production data for staging environments.
Implement production data masking to enable high-fidelity debugging and testing while maintaining data privacy.
